final_prompt: An eye-level, photorealistic photograph of a winter park scene. The ground is completely covered in white snow. Centered in the frame, an East Asian man in his 30s with light skin and short dark curly hair stands smiling, wearing a light blue short-sleeved button-up shirt, khaki pants, and white sneakers. Immediately to his left sits a golden retriever with golden fur, looking forward. In the background, numerous people dressed in dark winter coats, scarves, and hats are scattered across the snowy ground, walking and standing. Trees with green leaves are visible on the left and center of the background, with their trunks rising behind the man. Wooden benches are placed on the left and right sides of the background. A body of water is visible in the far background under a partly cloudy sky with soft, grayish tones. The lighting is soft and diffused, typical of an overcast day, casting gentle shadows. The atmosphere is chilly yet lively. The image has sharp focus and natural colors, with the camera at eye-level, directly facing the scene.
prompt_before: An eye-level photograph of a park scene with a man and dog centered in the frame. The ground is completely covered in a layer of white snow, hiding the green grass beneath. The man is an East Asian man in his 30s with light skin, short dark curly hair, wearing a light blue short-sleeved button-up shirt, khaki pants, and white sneakers, standing and smiling. To his left sits a golden retriever with golden fur, looking forward. In the background, numerous people are walking and standing around, dressed in winter attire such as dark coats, scarves, and hats, scattered across the snowy ground. Trees with green leaves are visible on the left and center, their trunks rising behind the man, and wooden benches are placed on the left and right sides of the background. A body of water is visible in the far background under a partly cloudy sky with soft, grayish tones. The lighting is soft and diffused, typical of an overcast winter day, casting gentle shadows with no harsh highlights. The overall atmosphere is chilly yet lively, with the snowy ground and people creating a wintery park scene. Photorealistic, sharp focus, natural colors. Perspective: Camera viewpoint: eye-level view, facing the park scene directly with the man and dog centered in the frame; Spatial positions: man in CENTER, dog in CENTER-LEFT, benches in BACKGROUND on LEFT and RIGHT, trees in BACKGROUND on LEFT and CENTER, water in far BACKGROUND; Frame composition: left third has trees and a bench, center has man and dog, right third has a bench and open space, upper half is sky, lower half is grass (now snowy); Lighting quality and direction: currently bright daylight with sharp shadows cast from the left, but for snowy scene, light becomes soft and diffused from an overcast sky. Style reference: Man: East Asian man, light skin with warm undertone, short dark curly hair, age approximately 30-40 years, lean build, wearing a light blue short-sleeved button-up shirt, khaki pants, and white sneakers; Dominant color palette: currently green grass, blue sky, light blue shirt, khaki pants, golden dog fur; after change, white snow dominates the ground with muted winter tones; Surface materials and textures: grass (now snow-covered), tree bark, man's cotton shirt and khaki pants, dog's fur; Overall atmosphere: currently cheerful and sunny; after change, becomes chilly, wintery, and lively with many people.

constraints: Is the ground completely covered in white snow?
Is the man centered in the frame?
Is the dog sitting to the left of the man?
Is the man East Asian with light skin and short dark curly hair?
Is the man wearing a light blue short-sleeved button-up shirt, khaki pants, and white sneakers?
Is the man standing and smiling?
Is the dog a golden retriever with golden fur, sitting and looking forward?
Are there people dressed in winter attire (dark coats, scarves, hats) scattered in the background?
Are there trees with green leaves on the left and center of the background?
Are there wooden benches on the left and right sides of the background?
Is there a body of water visible in the far background under a partly cloudy sky?
Is the lighting soft and diffused with gentle shadows, indicating an overcast day?
Is the image photorealistic with sharp focus and natural colors?
Is the camera at eye-level, directly facing the scene with the man and dog centered?
